rationale: Pure planning/documentation PR for Sprint 2 of the Marathon-driven dev cycle. Updates .cursor/rules/sprint-context.md to move Sprint 2 from 'Kickoff' to 'Specification' phase, lists selected requirements R1 (Schedule/Cron Triggers), R2 (Event Triggers GitHub/GitLab), R6 (Automation Builder UI), and expands the Sprint Goals paragraph. Updates .marathon/inputs/requirements.md to flip R1/R2/R6 status from [TODO] to [IN SPRINT]. Creates two new artifacts: .marathon/sprints/002/spec.md (5 user stories with priority labels P1/P2/P3, 15 functional requirements FR-001..FR-015, 7 measurable success criteria SC-001..SC-007, key entities Automation/AutomationRun/TriggerConfig/FilterCondition, clarifications session log) and .marathon/sprints/002/clarifications.md (10 ambiguities C1-C10 resolved including router architecture multi-match, scheduler concurrency timer-based with Redis pub/sub, automation entity ownership, session FK + audit table, webhook async dispatch, cron-parser library selection, single-page form vs wizard, agentRuns trigger enum, filter conditions JSON schema; 4 gaps G1-G4 covering execution timeout/rate limiting/error state/REST API; 2 contradictions and 5 alternative implementations evaluated with comparison tables). No production code changes; matches the PR body's stated scope as a kickoff + specify + clarify pipeline step.
